edits.content: "\n💡 Note: Different detection methods are expected:"
"  - YAML: Direct AST analysis (more accurate for empty classes)"
"  - TOON: Inferred from function grouping (only classes with methods)"
"  - YAML: Direct module imports and file-level analysis"
"  - TOON: Inferred from function locations (more granular)"
